markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance and plan the integration docs project.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Rebound:** Organic conversions are outpacing the December baseline (16 guides, 75 templates), reversing a January dip. Templates remain the top driver.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**New Content Published:** 25 guides, 10 in-house templates, and several templates from Sebastian are now live. Template categories are also implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Integration Docs Project:** GrowthX will take over integration docs from the time-constrained PMM team. The project is contingent on a technical deep-dive to satisfy the team's quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Tools Workflow Delayed:** The new tools workflow is now expected by mid-March, a slight delay due to the lead engineer's vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Updates

  - [**Organic Conversion Tracking (Feb 1–15 vs. Dec Baseline):**](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Guides:** 16 conversions](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Templates:** 75 conversions](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Result:** Performance is currently outpacing the December baseline, suggesting the January dip was an anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**New Content Published Last Week:**](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [25 guides](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [10 in-house templates](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [Several templates from Sebastian](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Template Categories:** Now live on the templates page.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Tools Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**Status:** In fine-tuning with test templates.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**ETA:** Mid-March, a slight delay due to the lead engineer's vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

### Integration Docs Project

  - [**Opportunity:** Expand the current 14 integration pages to capture high search volume for tools like Figma, Resend, and PostHog.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Ownership:** GrowthX will take over the project from the PMM team, who lack the time to scale it.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The PMM team requires a deep understanding of GrowthX's content generation process to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Process Overview:** Research (using Atlas/Agza) → Draft → Fact-check → Refine against style guides.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** A call with Kirkland (GrowthX engineer) to provide a technical deep-dive.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

### Internal Analytics Request

  - [**Request:** Data on projects that require users to purchase additional credits.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Status:** Not yet available.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Priority:** A "nice-to-have" for informing content strategy, not a blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:** Send Sam live Webflow integration pages as examples.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Megan:** Schedule a call with Sam, the PMM team, and Kirkland (GrowthX engineer) for a technical deep-dive on the content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Sam:** Discuss the integration docs strategy (e.g., pace, resource allocation) internally.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Sam:** Follow up on the internal analytics request.](https://fathom.video/share/8R3vb1zBwyBkdmHFCKkRtDiPuzSt_U3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
